title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 272.100 - Duties of persons appointed — their fees
text:
272.100.  Duties of persons appointed — their fees. — The persons appointed by the associate circuit judge pursuant to section 272.040 to discharge the duties therein specified shall receive twenty-five dollars each per day for the time actually employed, which shall be taxed as costs in the case against the parties and collected accordingly.
(RSMo 1939 § 14578, A.L. 2001 H.B. 219 merged with S.B. 462) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12915; 1919 § 5520; 1909 § 6463
